questions: You mentioned wincing at the $4.38 cost per run with 360k tokens—what made you decide that was acceptable to move forward with, versus trying to optimize the workflow first?
Why did you choose to run the adversary and defender as separate agents instead of having a single agent play both roles and switch perspectives?

You picked that standing desk claim specifically because it was 'arguable' to ensure the loop would run multiple rounds—how did you know in advance whether a claim would spark enough debate, and does that matter for real claims from your registry?
